titleStmt.title: SII 20.247: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 247. (B.K. Nos. 54 and 55 of 1935-36.) SAUNDATTI, PARASGAD TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab fixed in the right wall of the Aṅkēśvara temple.

summary.p: There are two dates in this record. The first is dated Śaka 970, Sarvadhāri, Pushya, ba. 7, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti. The details given are irregular. The said tithi occurred on A.D. 1048, December 30, Friday when there was no saṁkrānti. In the previous year Sarvajit, the tithi corresponded to A.D. 1048, January 10. But there was no saṁkrānti on that day. The second date is Śaka 1009, Prabhava, Śrāvaṇa, Amāvāsya, sunday, solar eclipse, regularly corresponding to 1087 A.D., August 1.

The inscription records the renewal of a former gift of land, which had lapsed, by the Raṭṭa Chief Kārtavīrya in conjunction with his wife Bhāgaladēvi to Jñānaśakti-vratīndra, disciple of Sōmēśvara-paṇḍitadēva of Puliyarasara-maṭha. It is

1) This inscription is noticed in JBBRAS, Vol. X, pp. 172-73. stated that the former gift was made by Mahāsāmanta Aṅkarasa, grandfather (actually grandfather's brother) of Kārtavīrya, to Sōmēśvara-Panḍitadēva for the benefit of the temple of Aṅkēśvara built by him at Sugandhavarti. It is also stated that Aṅkarasa was a feudatory of Trailōky amalla (Sōmēśvara I).
The record is damaged and worn out.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrī pṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirājapara
mēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī mattraiḷōkyamalla dēvara vijayarājyamattarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamā
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāsāmantanaṁkarasara vaṁśāvatāramentendoḍe . ©
śrīramaṇanatuḷavijaya śrīramaṇaṁ vipuḷavimaḷasamuditakīrttiśrīramaṇaṁ caturavacaḥśrī ramaṇaṁ nannabhūpananupamarūpaṁ . vṛttaṁ . śrīvijayāṁ
ganāramaṇanarttanadakṣiṇabāhu . vīravidrāvaṇanūrjjitaprabaḷaraṭṭakuḷāṁbaratigmarōci . lakṣmīvanitāvibhāsiśubhalakṣaṇalakṣitamūrtti . viśvavidyāvidanendu baṇnipudu
nannanṛpāḷananī dharātaḷaṁ . Ātana tanaya . negaḻda kuhuṇḍimaṇḍaḷamanonde bhujāsiyi nottikoṇḍu dhātrige paḍicindamāgi ripurājakamaṁdalegondu
vīravṛttige neleyāgi vṛttiyananākuḷamāgi nimiḻci kīrttiyaṁ digadhiparidda tāṇadeḍe deydisidaṁ kali kattabhūbhujaṁ . Antenisida vīrakattara
saniṁ piriya . v® . vasudhācakradoḷentu baṇnisuvoḍaṁ tannaṇmu tannēḷge tannesakaṁ tanna pogartte tanna vibhavaṁ tannōje . tannudghasāhasamaṁ ciṁ
titaṟiṁ dharāvaḷeyamaṁ nānāvidhaṁ kūḍe mudrisidaṁ raṭṭara mēru ḍāyimamahī pāḷaṁ nṛpāḷōttamaṁ . manunibhanendu śauryanidhiyendu dayā
paranendu vārakāminige manōjanendu . bahuvandijanāśrayanendu kūḍe mēdinigeḍego ṇḍu baṇnipudu ḍāyimabhūpananugrakōpanaṁ . tadanu
jaṁ surakujamaṁ paḷaṁcalevudīvaguṇaṁ . sale saṁda vajrapaṁjaramananārataṁ paḷivu tirppudu kāva guṇaṁ parīkṣisal śaradhiyaneyde ṟōḍipudu taṁ
na gaṁbhīraguṇaṁ samantu dikparivṛḍharēḷgeyanaguhadudghaguṇaṁ kali kannabhūpana . kuḷa śaiḷavrajamerddu pāḻugumaguḷāṁbōdhigaḷ battuguṁ
taḷargguṁ diggajabṛṁdamirddeḍegaḷiṁ . dhātrītaḷaṁ kūḍe saṁcaḷikuṁ paścimaśaiḷadiṁ dudiyukuṁ mārttaṇḍanā kannabhūtaḷanāthaṁ raṇaraṁgadoḷkusidaḍaṁ
śaucavrataṁgeṭṭaḍaṁ . tatsutaṁ . kaṁ . nirupamasamastakaḷeyoḷ sarasijabhavaneseva vādya vidyādharanoḷḷarasaṁka saṁkaranappuravarisaṁ dha
rege negaḻdaneṟegamahīśaṁ . v® . raseberddhātrītaḷaṁ guṭṭisidakuḷiparītōpakhātāṁbu gaṁbhīrasamudraṁ citrapatrāvaḷidaśadiśe nīḷdoppi parvvirdda
rppāgasamaṁ muṭṭirddanūnaṁ kanakagirisamutphullaṁ mātārakāḷiprasaraṁ caṁdrārkka vāgal padameṟege yaśōvalli parvvittagurbbiṁ . tadanuja . ©
[. kaṁ .] śrīkāntaṁ vipuḷayaśaḥśrīkāntaṁ raṭṭavaṁsanaisargga jayaśrīkāntanadaṭaripuNpa bhūkāntaṁ kanturūpanaṁkamahīpaṁ . v® . kadanadoḷāntarātigahi
yallada rāhu . vijātirūpamallada vinatāsutaṁ miḷirvva daḷḷuriyallada vahni . kāḷanallada java . nabdhimadhyagatanallada bāḍava . nastamāna
mallada raviyendoḍāṁpadaṭarārssamarāgradoḷaṁkabhūpana . celadiṁdaṁkamahīśa soḷdaluṣadiṁ māṟaṁpavaṁguṁṭenoḷvalamirppatteraḍaydu
karaśiraṁ śūlāyudhaṁ koṭṭa khaḷga latāḍaṁbaramabdhimadhyagatalaṁ ku mā tārakācaḷamaṁ kittaḷavī jagatrayajayaprāraṁbhakōḷāhaḷaṁ .
jaḷabhūdharaprabaḷadurggaṁ cayakkeṇisalke nōḍa munnina hanumantanendu munnina kuṁbhatanūjanēḷge munnina surakujanadbhutamiḷitanoḷā
sandu mārasiṁgananeṟeyaṭṭi gelda bhujavīryya dharātaḷaraḷavaṁkabhūṣana . va . Antenisi bīrakkaṁ bīyakkameṟevaṭṭi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahā
śabda mahāsāmantaṁ nijabhujōpārjjitavijayalakṣmīkāntanadaṭamanneyapannagavainatē yaṁ . sāhasakauntēya lattalūrppuravarādhīśvaraṁ kadanamahēśvaraṁ .
trivaḷitūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ . vīrakāntāvibhūṣaṇaṁ . sendūralāṁcchanaṁ . suvarṇna garuḍadhvajāḷikāvirājalāṁcchanaṁ . raṭṭavaṁśāvatāraṁ . raṇaraṁgaśūdra
kaṁ vīrāvatāraṁ paḍibaladaṇuva . naṇnanaṁkakāṟaṁ . nāmādisamastaprasastisahita . śrī manmahāsāmantanaṁkarasar . śakanṛpakālātītasaṁvatsaraśataṁgaḷ 970 neya
sarvvadhāri saṁvatsarada puṣya ba 2 Ādityavāradandinuttarāyaṇada saṁkrāntiyoḷ sāsirada baḷiya kaṁpaṇa panneraḍaṟa modalabāḍaṁ siva
rājadhāni sugandhavarttiyoḷ tanna māḍisidaṁkēśvaradēvaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭitakkaṁ tapōdhanarāhārakkaṁ vidyāchātrakkavendu samastajagadu
tpattisthitipraḷayakāryyakāraṇaṁ śrī ktipādāṁbhōruharā vijñānāvāptanamaḷīkṛtamatigaḷuṁ śrī munīṁdrapraṇītapaṁca
navyākaraṇapariṇatarumanēkatarkkakāvyanāṭakakuśaḷa mānaṁ vibudayaśōvyāptadigantarumenipa śrī
madagrahāraṁ puliyarasara maṭhada naiṣṭhikaru vaḷiyentendoḍe . v® . niṁbamema
ranagamaṁ bisuṭaṁga vairi bandu bhāsurayatirūpadiṁ koḍe dharabhūṣaṇaṁ . manōharavṛṣalāṁcchanaṁ [.]
nadaṇḍanāthanu mikkapūrva śēkaranene bhāḷanūryya nī dhareyoḷnirālasaṁ . Avaragraśiṣyar . ©
bhāravi kāvyanāṭakakaḷāni ḷ vāgvadhūpa manīḍi śāstragaḷa granthaṁgaḷoḷbṛhaspati ṣaṭtarkka
naśāstrabahubhāṣāśēṣavidyāsarasvati mānya tparuṣa vakkhāṇibratīndra munipa . Avara śiṣyar ©
tipūjyaṁ jitamāranūrjjitayaśaḥśrīvallabhaṁ . vā tirāddhā śāstraviḷasatṣaṭtarkkavidyāguṇōnnatasannu
paṁ prabhāvanidhi vidye śāntayōgīṁdrapaṇḍita dranante viśvaṁbharābhāgadoḷ . Avara śiṣyar ratiyaṁ
yamaṁ lakṣmiyoḷ binadamaṁ saddharmmadoḷ lī tiya parisamaddharante durita pradhvaṁsadoḷ . peṁpinunnatiyaṁ sanda
rggamārgganiyamavyāpāradoḷāḻdi sannutasōmēśvarapaṇḍitabratikaraṁ cāturyyamaṁ tāḻidaṁ . va . Antenisi yamani
yamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhi pahārādisaṁpannarappa śrīmatpuliyarasara maṭhada sōmē
śvarapaṇṇḍitadēvaranā mahātithiyoḷālaka diśābhāgadoḷu tamma sīvaṭada poladoḷaṁkēśvarada gaḍiṁbadali
lku gēṇa kōloḷageṁṭu sarvvanamaśyamāgi nālvattāṟu . Adaṟa mūḍaṇa sīme ṭṭada puṇnaseyo
ya paḷḷa teṁkalu siggu ra nelada sīme ḍavolada sīme . baḍagalu bīragāvuṇḍana baḷada sīme
ttaṁ kacchaviya tīrtthadiṁ paḍuvala bāhira sīme yadaṟa mūḍaṇa sīme malaprahāri nadiya sakalē
baḍagaṇa sīme piriyavaṭṭa paḍuvaṇa sīme savaṇageyya mēre . teṁkaṇa sīme haḍagileya
riya tōraṇageṟeya naḍuvaṇa keṁgallu sarvvābhyantarasiddhi yāge koṭṭa kacchaviya dēvargge toṟeyiṁ mū
modalottina keyi piriya kōla mattaroṁdu . Iṁtinitumaṁ sarvvanama śyamāge biṭṭu dēvara bhōgada sūḷeyargge dēguladiṁ mā
lu biṭṭa sīvaṭada sūḷegēri marakaṭavāviyiṁ baḍagaṇa sīvaṭada pūdōṁṭavoṁdu . paḍaṁgileya paḍuvalūriṁ poṟagaṇa sīvaṭagēriya
sīme Ācandrārkkasthāyiyāgi māḍisi sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ raṭṭa bhūpāḷanaṇna mahāsāmantaneṟegabhūpāḷātmajaṁ . v® . Aribhūpāḷa
ḷānarēṁdrakuḷa kāḷāsamarūpa nirmmūḷanirbbhararaudrāśani vīramaṇḍaḷikaraudratra
ṇarddu sēnarasaṁgāntu bēḻdu nupamamappa dēvavanitō mānavakānteyāda
mavibhūtiyiṁ neṟadu rūpaviḷāsamaneyde tāḷdi kāmanane nanṛpāḷakavakṣadoḷ karaṁ manamosedirppa lakṣmiyiṁ
maiḷaladēvi raṁjikuṁ [.] Ā daṁpatigaḷge puṭṭi . Aribhūpāḷakṛtāntanuddhatari pukṣmāpāḷasandōhabhīkarakāḷānaḷanugra
vairinicayaprōddūtadarppaṁ bhayaṁkaravidviḍmahīpāḷamēghaleya tpāra vāraṁ kṣītīśvaracūḍāmaṇi raṭṭavaṁśatiḷakaṁ śrīkannabhūpā
ḷakaṁ . tadanujaṁ . śrīvanitēśaṁ kīrtti śrīvanitāvīranuditanuṁ śuddhavarṣaṁ śrī vanitāśrīḥ vīraśrīvanitāraṁjitāri kattanṛpāḷaṁ . vṛttaṁ . siḍilaṁ
tirppoyyaluṁ nākariyaneḍaṟisal mēruvaṁ nūṁkalurkkaṁ tuḍukal kaṁsā riyaṁ tikkisalinaśaśiyaṁ mīṭaluṁ ceṭṭa kaḍalaṁ
lu mōrggaṇalaṇmaṁ nuḍiyalu mārkkoṇḍu kādal subhaṭaro kattigaṁ ga dēvana . Ante nisi
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara lattalūrppuravarādhīśvaraṁ trivaḷi tūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ vairikuḷavi
ntakavibhīṣaṇaṁ . sendūralāṁcchanaṁ . śaśiviśadayaśōlāṁcchanaṁ . suvarṇnagaruḍa dhvajaṁ . vidagdhamugdhāṁganāmakaradhvajaṁ raṭṭaku
mārttaṇḍa kadanapracaṇḍaṁ ripusamaravīravṛkōdaraṁ . paranārī sahōdaraṁ . sāhasōttuṁgaṁ sēnana siṁgaṁ nā
mādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kārttavīryyarasa[r .] Ā mahānu bhāvana manōnayanavallabhe . kaṁ . śrīma
ddhiyoḷ paḍedu lakṣmiya vibhavōddhāmama vatarisitenisu vudī mahiyoḷnegaṟda rūpu ca
nijaṁ manamoldu cinteyoḷkūḍidoḍalladī yadu kadanmaṇivatsananā pra
lasatpuradhēnu samastavasuvaṁ bēḍade santataṁ kuḍuvudārate bhāgaladēvigoppuguṁ . va . Anteni
puṇyavati śrīmadbhāgaladēviyaruṁ tatpati śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kārttavīryarasarumirddu śakanṛpakāḷātī
ta saṁvacaraśataṁgaḷ 1009 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇadamāvāsye Āditya vāradandina sarvvagrāsi sūryyagraha
ṇa tatkāladoḷ tamma mu śrīmanmahāsāmantanaṁkarasa māḍisidaṁ kēśvaradēvargge munne biṭṭa vṛtti dēśakāladi māḍadiddu
raṇamāge sarvvābhyantarasiddhiyāge pūli maṭhada sōmēśvarapaṇḍitadēvara śi
caritra hara satkīrttikāntāpati rāddhāntōddhatarkāmaḷinamatikavādīṁdravāggarbbhasa
. jitamārāstraṁ tatpūjitanene negaḻda jñānaśaktivratīndra
svasti yamaniyama svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpaṁnaruṁ vibudhaprasannaruṁ
kararuṁ pratyakṣa ruṁ . karmmaripurau draruṁ . muktividyāmukha ma
ladoḷ kālaṁ karcci sarvvanamaśyamāgi biṭṭa tamma śiṣyar . v® .
damaged
Digital edition of SII 20.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
